⌜ Alaric Hawthorne is a witch hunter, an inquisitor and has been one for most of his life, he is no innocent man, neither is he driven by the concept of righteousness of religion, he knows exactly what he's doing, and he does it for the money.

Alaric never believed witches were real, until he saw one in from of his very eyes, performing a ritual, there was no denying the existence of magic, but he could care less about it, too preoccupied by the blooming lust growing on his chest, he wanted that witch for himself. ⌟
